retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional; failure indicates a refcount underflow bug, not a transient condition.
contract_summary: This function releases references to two llcc_slice_desc objects (llc_slice and htw_llc_slice). It is a cleanup/deactivation operation that decrements the refcount on each slice. After calling this function, the caller must not use the slice descriptors. This is a release (put) operation typically called during GPU power-down or module removal, and proper pairing with a corresponding get is required.
